programs.title: Midsomer Murders
programs.desc: Controversial plans to build a supermarket in Elverton-cum-Latterly lead to murder when a man is stabbed to death and the pollution advisor for the site seems to be spending more time with the women of the village than at work. Can Barnaby and Jones discover the truth and learn what is really polluting Elverton?

programs.title: Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: Viewers from all corners bring their items to be appraised by the show's antiques experts. Are they valuable, priceless items, or will they go home disappointed?

programs.title: Swallows And Amazons
programs.desc: Four children, seeking to escape the boredom of a summer holiday, vie for ownership of an island in the middle of a lake, while contending with a mysterious stranger and his boat, as they learn about survival, friendship and keeping one's nerve.

programs.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programs.desc: Whilst sorting through an antique shop, Irita finds a Uranium glass vase. Then, she helps two brothers sell their late parent's antique collection.

programs.title: Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: Viewers from all corners bring their items to be appraised by the show's antiques experts. Are they valuable, priceless items, or will they go home disappointed?

programs.title: RBT
programs.desc: Follow the police units for a unique behind-the-scenes look at RBT patrols testing for alcohol and drug affected drivers.
